## Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed. Please also include relevant motivation and context.

Fixes # (issue)

## Area of Interest
Please check the appropriate boxes regarding the scope of your changes:
- [ ] **Frontend (React)**: Changes in `client/`
- [ ] **Frontend (Legacy)**: Changes in `views/` (EJS) or `public/css/`
- [ ] **Backend API**: Changes in Express routes, controllers, or services
- [ ] **Streaming Engine**: Changes to FFmpeg orchestration, worker threads, or stream cleanup
- [ ] **Database / Config**: Changes to MySQL queries, schema, or Docker setup

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist for Submitters:
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have added/updated necessary comments, particularly in hard-to-understand areas (like FFmpeg spawns)
- [ ] I have tested this thoroughly (including streaming stability if applicable)
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings in the terminal logs
